# lienstripping.org

> Guide to lien stripping and lien avoidance in bankruptcy.

lienstripping.org is a free, open-source educational resource about removing liens through bankruptcy. Part of the Open Bankruptcy Project.

## Pages

- https://lienstripping.org/: Overview of lien stripping in bankruptcy
- https://lienstripping.org/lien-stripping.html: Lien stripping in Chapter 13 -- removing junior mortgages
- https://lienstripping.org/lien-avoidance.html: Lien avoidance under Section 522(f) -- judicial liens and nonpossessory security interests
- https://lienstripping.org/cramdown.html: Cramdown -- reducing secured debt to collateral value

## Contact

This site is maintained by volunteers. No legal advice is provided.
